Methodology
Data Cleaning Pipeline

A systematic 5-step process transformed 515 raw, messy records into a clean, analysis-ready dataset.

01
Duplicate Removal
Detected and removed 12 exact duplicate rows using pandas drop_duplicates()
–12 rows
02
Text Standardization
Normalized department, gender, and city fields to consistent Title Case format
3 columns fixed
03
Outlier Handling
Age outliers (impossible values) set to NaN. Salary outliers clipped using IQR method
17 outliers
04
Missing Values
256 NaN values filled using department-wise median — context-aware imputation
256 filled
05
Feature Engineering
Added salary_band, age_group, experience_band, and salary_per_year_exp columns
+4 features

Insights & Recommendations
Key Findings

Actionable insights discovered through the data cleaning and visualization process.

💰
Finance Leads Compensation
Finance department has the highest average salary. Consider whether compensation bands are competitively set across other departments to avoid salary-driven attrition.
⚠️
Marketing Has Highest Attrition
Marketing shows the highest turnover rate. Combined with below-average satisfaction scores, this signals a need for targeted engagement programs and career path clarity.
📉
Low Satisfaction Predicts Leaving
Employees who left had a measurably lower satisfaction score on average. Satisfaction is a leading indicator — pulse surveys and manager check-ins can catch this early.
📚
Training Drives Performance
Employees with 60–80 training hours show the highest average performance scores. ROI on L&D investment is clear — consider standardizing minimum training hours across depts.
🎯
Experience ≠ Higher Pay Equally
Salary-per-year-of-experience varies significantly by department. This suggests inconsistent compensation structures that may feel unfair to longer-tenured employees.
👥
Gender Pay Gap Exists
Certain departments show a measurable gender pay gap. HR should conduct a structured pay equity audit and implement clear band-based compensation to address disparities.
Employee Analytics Report · Built with Python, Pandas, Matplotlib & Seaborn
Data Cleaning & Visualization Project · 503 records · 4 dashboards · 17 features
